markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the strategy sprint for Airbyte's new AI product.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Airbyte is pivoting to AI to capture new budgets and reposition from a data platform to an "agenting data platform," solving data engineering problems for AI engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Product Roadmap:** The strategy must align with a phased launch: a local, open-source MCP tool (Dec/Jan) for basic data fetch/write, followed by a full platform with data hosting and entity mapping.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [**Aggressive 6-Month Goals:** The target is to become the market standard, measured by 10k GitHub stars and a 3x increase in Talk-to-Sales leads (from \~30/mo to 90+/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The focus is on technical accuracy and credibility (80% MoF/BoF, 20% ToF), leveraging founder Michelle's brand to build a new audience of AI engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3055.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Pivot to AI

  - [**Problem:** AI teams now control budgets, while data platform budgets are shrinking. Airbyte's brand is not top-of-mind for AI data solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Insight:** AI engineers face data engineering problems (discovery, transformation) but lack the expertise to solve them.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Solution:** Become the trusted data layer for AI agents, leveraging Airbyte's credibility with data teams.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Positioning:** Coexist with the data platform, then merge into a single "agenting data platform."](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### Product Roadmap & Vision

  - [**Vision:** A platform enabling agents to discover, normalize, and interact with data across systems (e.g., Salesforce, Zendesk) via an SDK.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [**Phased Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
    1.  [**MCP Tool (Dec/Jan):** A local, open-source library for basic data fetch, search, and write.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
    2.  [**Full Platform (Post-MCP):** Adds raw data hosting, entity mapping, and ontology for advanced agent capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
    3.  [**Merge:** Integrate the MCP tool and full platform into a single product.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Target Audience & Competitors

  - [**Primary ICP:** AI engineers and lead software engineers at startups or enterprise incubator teams.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**Profile:** Move fast, prefer self-serve tooling, and want to avoid building data infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [**Secondary ICP:** Enterprise product/engineering teams building internal agents with data sovereignty needs.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [**Key Competitors:**](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
      - [**Nango:** Offers easy auth but lacks data movement/transformation capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
      - [**Merge.dev:** An integration platform, not a data platform.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
      - [**Red Panda, Composio.dev:** Recently pivoted to this space.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
      - [**Superbase:** Just launched an ETL feature.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3451.0)

### Content Strategy & Goals

  - [**6-Month Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**DevRel:** 10,000 GitHub stars.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
      - [**Marketing:** 3x increase in Talk-to-Sales leads (from \~30/mo to 90+/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3055.0)
      - [**Technical Altitude:** 80% MoF/BoF (technical deep dives, diagrams) to build credibility; 20% ToF (high-level concepts) for awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3055.0)
      - [**Channels:** Prioritize developer-centric channels (GitHub, meetups) over traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3163.0)
      - [**Format:** Move beyond blogs to interactive templates, directories, and GitHub-based content.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2697.0)
  - [**Founder Voice:** Leverage Michelle's brand to build a new audience.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
      - [**Topics:** Data infra for AI, build vs. buy, scaling AI agents, and the AI ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2884.0)
      - [**Method:** Use Airbyte's AI agent, trained on Michelle's content and performance data, for social posts.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Synthesize notes and share in Slack within one day.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3481.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Schedule a deep-dive interview with Michelle and a product walkthrough session.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien:** Serve as the primary contact for coordination.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [**Airbyte:** Share concrete customer stories and use cases as they develop to enrich content.](https://fathom.video/share/onWQCG8oB8TEH5-hNTgx3yQ2b6scGduy?tab=summary&timestamp=3229.0)
